page_content:
Transportation Services

transportation.umd.edu

The best way to receive inclement weather notifications directly is to sign up for UMD text alerts. Answers to frequently asked questions are available at umd.edu/weather.

The University of Maryland Department of Transportation Services (DOTS) provides a full range of parking and transportation services to a diverse community of more than 50,000 students, faculty and staff in the Greater College Park area.
